steps.content: The equation $5.65x + 7.45y = 1{,}348.25$ models total revenue: each term is (price per unit) times (number of units sold). The variable $x$ is the number of smaller containers sold.

In the term $5.65x$, the coefficient 5.65 is multiplied by $x$ (number of smaller containers). That coefficient is the price per smaller container, a fixed dollar amount, not an expression involving a variable.

Evaluate every choice:
  • A: $5.65$ - This is the coefficient of $x$, so it represents the price per smaller container. That matches the correct answer; A is correct.
  • B: $7.45y$ - This is the entire revenue from larger containers, not the price per smaller container. Eliminated.
  • C: $7.45$ - This is the price per larger container, not the smaller one. Eliminated.
  • D: $5.65x$ - This is the total revenue from smaller containers, not the price of each one. Eliminated.
